title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the conclusion of the Twinkle Series, Meisho
Doto and I have safely made it through our first
three years together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her spectacular results commanded attention
from the URA, so an idea is proposed.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You want me to participate in a joint award
ceremony? With you?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, of course! We will speak of our
accomplishments to an audience of our fans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What say you, Doto? Will you join me in this
special performance?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It w-would be an honor. But with an opportunity
as great as this, I'm bound to get nervous.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What should I do, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Why not give it a go? I'll come along.
Why not give it a go? I'll come along.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
All r-right. It should be okay with you around.
Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the day of the joint awards ceremony...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uugh, my legs won't stop shaking... Will this go
okay? Can I really run like this?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why the stage fright? You're more nervous than
you are before races.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'll make my entrance first. All you have to do is
follow my lead.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-o-okay... Let's go, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I need to do my best—I just have to!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Smack!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaaagh, I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her bag strap goes flying into her face.

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Today, we're having a joint appearance from
none other than Meisho Doto and T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Please, a round of applause for these two, who
brought so much excitement to the Twinkle
Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow... I feel all warm and fuzzy inside.
Everyone is treating me with such kindness.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I have to return the favor. I have to, but... I can't
stop shaking.

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Now, without further ado, let's all enjoy an
elegant display of partner running from these two
great racers.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay, it's the real thing! I have to start...
r-running!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Doto, no! We're supposed to be running together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto zips away, leaving behind T.M.
Opera O and the expectations of their fans.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, where did Opera O go?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I... l-left her behind?! Ohhh, I messed up again...

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry about this, Trainer... I'm so clumsy and
stupid... always immediately making mistakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto has changed in a lot of ways, but
some habits are hard to kick. She's still her clumsy
and anxious self. However...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to give this one more go, starting from
the beginning! I want both Opera O and my fans
to cheer for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not accustomed to giving up. With every
failure, she's right back on her feet, ready to see
it to the end.
